data.value: This field is required

data.name: IsEmpty
data.value: Field is empty

data.value: This record already exists

data.value: Record not found

data.value: Invalid value provided

data.value: Access denied

data.value: Phone number or password is incorrect

data.value: User not found

data.name: User_Unauthorized
data.value: Unauthorized access

data.name: IndividualUserCanNotInvite
data.value: Individual users cannot send invitations

data.name: PhoneNumberBlockedUntilTime
data.value: Your phone number is blocked until {0}

data.name: TryAfterTime
data.value: Please try again after {0}

data.name: InvalidOtpCode
data.value: Invalid verification code

data.name: InvitationContentByUserIdContent
data.value: {0} has invited you to join

data.name: InvitationContentByPhoneNumber
data.value: {0} has invited you to join their team on Maydon.rent. Register at https://admin-test.maydon.tech/ to accept the invitation.

data.name: Storage_UploadFailed
data.value: Failed to upload file to storage

data.name: Storage_DownloadFailed
data.value: Failed to download file from storage

data.name: Storage_DeleteFailed
data.value: Failed to delete file from storage

data.name: Storage_ConnectionError
data.value: Unable to connect to storage service

data.name: MinioApi_UploadFailed
data.value: Failed to upload file via MinIO API

data.name: MinioApi_DeleteFailed
data.value: Failed to delete file via MinIO API

data.name: MinioApi_ConnectionError
data.value: Unable to connect to MinIO API service

data.name: MinioApi_InvalidResponse
data.value: Invalid response received from MinIO API

data.name: RegistrationCodeContent
data.value: Confirmation code for registration in the Maydon.rent system {0}

data.name: RestorePasswordContent
data.value: Confirmation code for password reset in the Maydon.rent system {0}

data.name: ContractDebtContent
data.value: According to Contract {0} dated {1}, there is an outstanding debt of {2} sums. We kindly ask you to settle the debt

data.name: ContractNewTermContent
data.value: Dear Client, We propose to renew Contract {0} for a new term. We would be pleased to continue our cooperation

data.name: ContractExpiredContent
data.value: Dear Customer, we inform you that Contract Number {0} will be terminated soon

data.name: OnlyIndividualsCanBind
data.value: Only Individuals Can Bind

data.name: UserStateTimeIsExpired
data.value: User state timeIs expired

data.name: InvalidUserValue
data.value: Invalid user value

data.name: OwnerCanNotMakeRequestToOwnListing
data.value: You cannot make a request to your own listing

data.name: InactiveListingCannotAcceptRequests
data.value: Inactive listing cannot accept requests

data.name: ListingRequestWasAcceptedByOwner
data.value: This request has already been accepted by the owner

data.name: ListingRequestAlreadyCancelled
data.value: This request has already been cancelled

data.name: ListingRequestAlreadyRejected
data.value: This request has already been rejected

data.name: WasAcceptedByModerator
data.value: This item was already accepted by the moderator

data.value: This item was cancelled by the user

data.value: This item was rejected by the moderator

data.name: WasBlockedByModerator
data.value: This item was blocked by the moderator

data.value: A user with this phone number already exists

data.value: The phone number format is invalid

data.value: The password does not meet the requirements

data.name: User_AccountNotActive
data.value: Your account is not active

data.value: The specified role was not found

data.value: A role with this name already exists

data.value: This role cannot be deleted as it is in use

data.value: One or more specified permissions were not found

data.value: Company not found

data.value: Invalid company TIN format

data.value: You already have an account of this type

data.value: Invalid account switch key

data.name: Account_CannotDeactivateOwn
data.value: You cannot deactivate your own account
